column6: Financial stability is important before starting a business.

column8: Register: Neutral/Formal | Word family: finance (n/v), financial (adj), stable (adj), stability (n) | Cách dùng: Speaking Part 3, Writing Task 2 - money, work | Collocation/Note: achieve/maintain financial stability; opposite: financial instability

column3: (n phrase) những thách thức chung/cùng phải đối mặt
column5: Climate change and pandemics are shared challenges.

column7: common problems, collective challenges, mutual concerns
column8: Register: Formal/Neutral | Word family: share (v), shared (adj), challenge (n/v) | Cách dùng: Writing Task 2 - globalization, international cooperation | Collocation/Note: shared challenges such as climate change, pandemics, and global security

column3: (n phrase) biến đổi khí hậu
column5: Climate change threatens food security in many countries.

column8: Register: Neutral/Formal | Word family: climate (n), climatic (adj), change (n/v) | Cách dùng: Writing Task 2 - environment | Collocation/Note: address/combat/mitigate climate change

column3: (n) đại dịch; (adj) mang tính đại dịch, lan rộng toàn cầu
column5: The pandemic disrupted education and employment worldwide.
column6: Pandemic risks require strong international cooperation.
column8: Register: Neutral/Formal | Word family: pandemic (n/adj), epidemic (n/adj) | Cách dùng: Writing Task 2 - health, globalization | Collocation/Note: pandemic = global outbreak; epidemic = regional/widespread outbreak

column3: (n phrase) hợp tác khoa học
column5: Scientific cooperation helps countries respond to global diseases.
column6: Space research depends on strong scientific cooperation.
column7: research collaboration, academic cooperation, knowledge sharing
column8: Register: Formal | Word family: science (n), scientist (n), scientific (adj), cooperate (v), cooperation (n) | Cách dùng: Writing Task 2 - international cooperation, science | Collocation/Note: science alone is not usually a challenge; scientific cooperation fits the context better

column3: (n phrase) an ninh toàn cầu
column5: Terrorism and cybercrime are threats to global security.
column6: International cooperation is essential for global security.
column7: international security, world peace, collective security
column8: Register: Formal | Word family: globe (n), global (adj), security (n), secure (adj/v) | Cách dùng: Writing Task 2 - globalization, politics | Collocation/Note: threat to global security; enhance/maintain global security

column3: (v phrase) phối hợp chính sách
column5: Countries need to coordinate policies during global crises.
column6: Local governments should coordinate policies on public transport.
column8: Register: Formal | Word family: coordinate (v), coordination (n), coordinated (adj), policy (n) | Cách dùng: Writing Task 2 - government, international cooperation | Collocation/Note: coordinate policies/efforts/actions; policy plural when multiple measures

column3: (n phrase) tác hại/sự bất lợi đối với môi trường
column5: Industrial expansion can cause environmental detriment.

column7: environmental harm, ecological damage, environmental cost
column8: Register: Formal | Word family: detriment (n), detrimental (adj), environment (n), environmental (adj) | Cách dùng: Writing Task 2 - environment | Collocation/Note: to the detriment of + noun is more common than an environmental detriment

column3: (v phrase) có khả năng phá hủy môi trường nguyên sơ
column5: Poorly managed tourism can potentially wreck the pristine environment.
column6: Large resorts may potentially wreck the pristine environment.
column8: Register: Strong/Neutral | Word family: potential (adj/n), potentially (adv), wreck (v), pristine (adj) | Cách dùng: Writing Task 2 - environment, tourism | Collocation/Note: potentially + base verb; consider formal alternative: may pose a threat to pristine environments

column3: (n phrase) sự cạnh tranh khốc liệt/khắc nghiệt
column5: Small shops struggle to survive cut-throat competition.

column7: fierce competition, intense rivalry, brutal competition
column8: Register: Informal/Neutral | Word family: compete (v), competition (n), competitive (adj), competitor (n) | Cách dùng: Writing Task 2 - business, globalization | Collocation/Note: hyphenated before noun; quite vivid, use carefully in formal essays

column3: (n) sự phá sản, tình trạng mất khả năng trả nợ
column5: Cut-throat competition can push small firms into bankruptcy.
column6: The company declared bankruptcy after years of losses.
column8: Register: Formal/Neutral | Word family: bankrupt (adj/v/n), bankruptcy (n) | Cách dùng: Writing Task 2 - business, economy | Collocation/Note: declare/file for/go into bankruptcy; bankrupt is adjective or verb

column3: (n) sự sáp nhập, hợp nhất doanh nghiệp/tổ chức
column5: The merger created one of the largest banks in Asia.
column6: A merger can help companies reduce operating costs.

column3: (v phrase) theo dõi/giám sát điều gì đó một cách cẩn thận

column3: (n phrase) động lực/thúc đẩy về kinh tế

column7: economic stimulus, driving force, boost, momentum

column3: (v phrase) đòi hỏi một lực lượng lao động lớn

column3: (v phrase) tạo cơ hội việc làm

column7: generate jobs, provide work, offer job opportunities

column3: (v phrase) thúc đẩy nền kinh tế khu vực
column5: Tourism can boost the regional economy significantly.

column3: (v) dừng lại, chấm dứt; (n) sự dừng lại
column5: The government must halt illegal logging immediately.
column6: Work came to a halt because of heavy rain.
column8: Register: Formal/Neutral | Word family: halt (v/n), halted (adj/past) | Cách dùng: Writing Task 2 - environment, policy | Collocation/Note: halt production/deforestation/spread; come to a halt

column3: (v phrase) thực thi các quy định môi trường nghiêm ngặt hơn
column5: Governments should enforce stricter environmental regulations on factories.
column6: Stricter rules must be enforced to protect forests.

column3: (v phrase) thúc đẩy các hoạt động công nghiệp bền vững
column5: Governments should promote sustainable industrial practices.
column6: Tax incentives can promote sustainable industrial practices.

column1: improve access to these energy sources
column3: (v phrase) cải thiện khả năng tiếp cận các nguồn năng lượng này
